pillars.name: NOW Respect
pillars.desc: Environment: decarbonisation, climate resilience, minimise impact.

pillars.name: NOW People
pillars.desc: Communities & employees: health & safety, diverse talent, social impact.

pillars.name: NOW Right
pillars.desc: Governance, integrity & innovation: ethics, transparency, long-term value.

targets.validation: Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi), validated Feb 2025, 1.5°C-aligned

financing: Sustainability-Linked Financing Framework (KPI/target-based, DNV second-party opinion) — coupon step-ups tied to the SBTi-aligned GHG targets. Not a use-of-proceeds green bond.
reporting: Integrated Annual Report (financial + ESG) with EY limited assurance on the sustainability statement (CSRD-aligned); CDP Climate & Water questionnaires; EU Taxonomy disclosures.
note: ESG ratings are point-in-time and change frequently — verify against the latest disclosures before external use.
